CustomField.description: The navigation target for the primary button. For External Page type, enter a full URL. For SFDC New Tab type, use the format "{pageReference}:{objectOrPageApiName}:{action}" per the Lightning NavigationMixin API.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For External Page: the URL to open. For SFDC New Tab: a NavigationMixin value like "standard__objectPage:Account:list".
CustomField.label: Primary Button Value
